checklists.title: Define a Chennai trip plan
steps: List every traveller, age, mobility need and emergency contact.
Confirm destination, purpose, dates and acceptable alternate dates.
Set a total budget including local transfers, food, baggage and contingency.
Record booking owner, payment method and cancellation tolerance.
Create a shared itinerary with confirmation numbers and contact details.

checklists.title: Book domestic travel in India
steps: Compare total journey time, terminal location, baggage allowance and refund terms.
Enter each traveller name exactly as shown on the identity document intended for the journey.
Confirm child, senior, disability or assistance requirements before payment.
Select seats or berths and add required baggage or meals.
Save tickets, invoices, cancellation rules and operator contact details offline.

checklists.title: Prepare domestic travel documents in India
steps: Check the current transport operator's accepted identification rules for every traveller.
Carry the ticket or booking reference and the original or accepted digital identity record.
Carry prescriptions and a concise medical summary for important conditions.
Save accommodation address, host details and return or onward booking.
Keep emergency contacts and copies separate from the primary wallet or phone.

checklists.title: Pack for a trip from Chennai
steps: Check destination weather and planned activities close to departure.
Review operator baggage size, weight and restricted-item rules.
Pack medicines, chargers, identification and valuables in an accessible personal bag.
Add suitable clothing, footwear, sun or rain protection and reusable water support.
Label checked baggage and photograph contents and baggage tags when useful.

checklists.title: Manage departure from Chennai
steps: Reconfirm live flight, train or bus status and terminal or platform information.
Check in online where available and complete any required verification.
Allow extra time for Chennai traffic, security queues and seasonal rain.
Confirm the pickup vehicle, driver or public-transport route before leaving.
Send arrival expectations and booking details to the receiving contact.

checklists.title: Plan a Chennai terminal transfer
steps: Confirm the exact airport terminal, railway station or bus terminal rather than relying only on the city name.
Estimate travel time for the actual departure hour and add a traffic and weather buffer.
Choose a primary and backup transfer method.
Confirm luggage capacity, child or mobility needs and pickup point.
Share the route and expected arrival time with the travelling group.

checklists.title: Verify international travel eligibility from India
steps: Confirm every traveller has the required valid passport or travel document.
Check passport validity and blank-page requirements using the destination's official immigration or embassy source.
Verify visa, electronic travel authorisation, transit visa and return or onward-ticket rules.
Check name, date of birth and passport number across passport, visa and bookings.
Review special rules for minors, dual nationals, residents and travellers carrying restricted medicines.

checklists.title: Book international travel from India
steps: Compare complete itinerary, transit airports, connection times, baggage through-check and change rules.
Do not assume an airport transit removes the need for a transit visa.
Enter traveller details exactly as printed in the passport.
Review cancellation, schedule-change and missed-connection protections before payment.
Save airline, hotel, host and ground-transfer confirmations offline.

checklists.title: Prepare health and money for international travel
steps: Buy suitable travel medical and trip insurance after reviewing exclusions and claim contacts.
Check destination health, vaccination and medicine-import rules from official sources.
Carry medicines in labelled packaging with prescriptions or supporting letters when required.
Arrange at least two payment methods and notify issuers when appropriate.
Plan lawful foreign-currency access and keep emergency funds separate.

checklists.title: Prepare an international travel document pack
steps: Carry passport, visas or authorisations, tickets, accommodation and insurance records.
Store encrypted digital copies and accessible offline copies.
Leave a copy of the itinerary and emergency contacts with a trusted person.
Record consular contacts and the process for a lost passport.
Keep original documents secure and copies in a separate location.

checklists.title: Review Indian customs rules for travellers
steps: Review the current CBIC international-traveller and baggage guidance before departure and return.
Identify goods, currency or other items that may require declaration or supporting records.
Retain invoices for valuable items carried out and brought back when useful.
Do not carry another person's package without inspecting and accepting responsibility for it.
Use the official declaration process or seek customs guidance when uncertain.

checklists.title: Manage international departure from Chennai
steps: Verify airline, flight status, correct terminal and check-in opening time.
Complete online check-in and destination document forms when available.
Reach the terminal with the airline-recommended international departure buffer plus local traffic allowance.
Keep passport and travel documents accessible for airline, security and immigration checks.
Confirm arrival transport and communications before boarding.

checklists.title: Define a birthday party scope
steps: Set the date, time, format and maximum attendance.
Agree on budget categories and a contingency reserve.
Record the celebrant's preferences and any age-specific safety needs.
Choose who approves vendors, spending and guest-list changes.
Create milestone dates for venue, invitation, catering and final confirmations.

checklists.title: Select an event venue in Chennai
steps: Confirm legal capacity, usable spaces, accessibility, toilets, parking and public-transport access.
Inspect kitchen, power, ventilation or air-conditioning, rain protection and emergency exits.
Obtain a written quote listing rental, taxes, deposit, cleaning, electricity, overtime and damage charges.
Confirm setup, event and teardown windows plus vendor access rules.
Read cancellation, refund, decoration, sound, fire, food and alcohol conditions before paying.

checklists.title: Manage event guests
steps: Create one controlled guest list with household counts and contact details.
Send date, time, accurate map, parking and RSVP deadline.
Collect dietary, mobility, child-seating and accessibility needs.
Follow up once before the final vendor-count deadline.
Prepare a final attendance list and a small documented buffer.

checklists.title: Manage Chennai event vendors
steps: Define deliverables, quantities, timings, setup needs and acceptance criteria.
Compare written quotations and verify references for high-value vendors.
Use written contracts or confirmations covering payment stages, cancellation, substitution and damage responsibility.
Record vendor contacts, balances, arrival times and onsite coordinator.
Confirm all details again at least several days before the event and keep proof of payment.

checklists.title: Prepare family event safety
steps: Assign responsible adults for children, elders and guests needing assistance.
Check exits, stairs, balconies, electrical cables, temporary structures and trip hazards.
Provide safe drinking water, food-allergy handling and hygienic food storage.
Keep a basic first-aid kit and emergency contacts accessible.
Use a controlled pickup or handoff process for children when parents are not continuously present.

checklists.title: Run a family event day
steps: Create a timeline from vendor arrival through final cleanup.
Assign one person each for venue, guests, food, programme, payments and emergencies.
Conduct a pre-opening check of toilets, water, seating, power, exits and food readiness.
Keep the contact list, guest count, payment record and contingency supplies together.
Complete a final venue walkthrough, collect belongings and document handover.

checklists.title: Prepare a Chennai event weather plan
steps: Check the current forecast close to the event and identify heat, rain or wind exposure.
Provide shade, ventilation or cooling and sufficient drinking water for hot conditions.
Protect entrances, electrical equipment, food, décor and guest movement from rain.
Prepare covered pickup and drop-off arrangements for elders and children.
Define the decision time and communication method for moving or modifying an outdoor event.

checklists.title: Book a Greater Chennai Corporation community hall
steps: Use the official GCC booking page and select the correct zone, division, hall, month and year.
Check morning and evening availability; select both slots when a full day is required.
Confirm event eligibility, published capacity and any prohibited use before payment.
Record rental, surcharges, GST, refundable deposit and electricity, cleaning or PA-system charges shown for the selected hall.
Save registration, receipt, terms and contact details, and document the handover and refund process.

checklists.title: Define a wedding scope
steps: List ceremonies, dates, preferred areas and expected attendance for each function.
Set a total budget and category limits including contingency.
Assign decision makers and define who may approve changes or payments.
Create a master timeline for venue, vendors, clothing, invitations, travel and registration.
Record cultural, religious, accessibility and family requirements that vendors must follow.

checklists.title: Manage wedding guests
steps: Maintain one deduplicated guest list by function and household.
Send invitations with accurate venue map, timing and RSVP channel.
Track outstation travel, lodging, local transport, meals and special assistance.
Create seating or dining plans when the venue requires them.
Freeze guaranteed counts by each vendor deadline and record approved buffers.

checklists.title: Prepare for marriage registration in Tamil Nadu
steps: Identify the marriage law and registration route applicable to the couple and ceremony.
Use the current Tamil Nadu Registration Department or authorised e-Sevai process to identify the correct office and appointment method.
Check the current document list, age and address evidence, photographs, ceremony proof and witness requirements.
Ensure names and dates are consistent across all supporting records before submission.
Attend with originals, required copies and witnesses, then retain the acknowledgement and verify the issued certificate.

checklists.title: Run a Chennai wedding day
steps: Prepare a detailed schedule for every ceremony, meal, vendor and family handoff.
Assign empowered coordinators for couple, families, venue, guests, vendors and transport.
Confirm valuables, clothing, ritual supplies, rings or thali, documents and emergency kit.
Track vendor arrivals, balances and changes in writing.
Protect meal timing, elder access and guest transport from traffic or weather delays.

checklists.title: Close out a family event
steps: Complete a venue and rental inventory walkthrough.
Reconcile deposits, balances, overtime, breakage and refund dates.
Collect photographs, videos, gifts, documents and personal belongings.
Save final invoices, contracts, receipts and unresolved claims.
Record lessons, vendor performance and final spending for future family use.

checklists.title: Prepare a home for guests
steps: Complete essential construction, cleaning and pest-control work before food or décor setup.
Confirm electricity, water, toilets, lighting, ventilation and safe access.
Block unfinished or hazardous areas from guests and children.
Protect floors, fixtures and private storage from event traffic.
Prepare waste containers, cleaning supplies and a post-event restoration plan.

checklists.title: Plan a housewarming ceremony
steps: Confirm ceremony date, start time, duration and required participants.
Agree on officiant, ritual sequence and all supplies.
Confirm fire, smoke, food or decoration limitations with the building or property rules.
Assign setup, ceremony, guest and cleanup responsibilities.
Keep a simple backup plan for delayed participants or unavailable supplies.

checklists.title: Manage food for a family event
steps: Set menu, service style, guest count and dietary requirements.
Confirm caterer quantities, arrival, cooking or reheating needs and serving equipment.
Provide safe water, handwashing and protected hot and cold food holding.
Label significant allergens where practical and keep vegetarian or special meals identifiable.
Plan leftovers, donation where safe and permitted, waste separation and cleanup.

checklists.title: Plan Chennai event access
steps: Map guest entry, lift or stair access, loading and emergency access.
Estimate parking demand and identify lawful alternatives without blocking homes or gates.
Coordinate with apartment association, security or neighbours when shared access will be affected.
Share precise map pins, pickup points and public-transport guidance.
Assign a contact to resolve arrival and parking problems during the event.

checklists.title: Define event venue requirements
steps: Record event type, date flexibility, attendance and session timings.
List capacity, seating, stage, kitchen, power, sound, accessibility and toilet needs.
Identify setup, teardown, vendor loading and storage needs.
Record weather, parking, transport and neighbourhood constraints.
Set the maximum all-in venue cost and required cancellation flexibility.
